reviews.review_msg: Lectures were a little all over the place, he focuses on the larger themes in history. It is an essay based course and there is quite a bit of reading- a whole book a week usually. It was an interesting course though, you do learn some pretty cool stuff. Make sure to do the essays early in the term instead of leaving it to the last couple classes.

Very friendly, helpful, and enthusiastic prof to take classes with!  The weekly readings are mandatory (as it's required for the papers) but they're not difficult.  Tutorials becomes very helpful for the papers and the exams. (Mike or Michaele is a good TA to have!) Definitely one of the best History classes I've ever had!  :)

I love this guy! He made history so much more fun and made me want to stay in school! He's SUPER friendly and HILARIOUS when he mummbles to himself. It's adorable. He's great and always ready to help you out. TAKE HIS CLASSES!!! And his children look like Dora the explorer :)!!!
